name: PhenixFIN Corp
summary: PART I GENERAL PhenixFIN Corporation (PhenixFIN, the Company, we and us) is an internally-managed non-diversified closed-end management investment company incorporated in Delaware that has elected to be regulated as a business development company (BDC) under the Investment Company Act of 1940, as amended (the 1940 Act).
